name: Courses Golf & Grill
about: Courses Golf & Grill is an indoor golf venue and bar in Vancouver, WA, featuring a full kitchen and state-of-the-art Golfzon simulators. It offers over 250 real-world courses to play, with advanced ball tracking and realistic course conditions. The venue caters to golfers of all skill levels, providing a space for casual play, practice, dining, and hosting events. With a focus on creating a complete golf and entertainment experience, it combines technology with a food and drink service to provide an alternative to outdoor golf, especially during inclement weather.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 250 real-world courses on advanced simulators
Realistic ball tracking and video replay to improve game analysis
A full-service kitchen and bar for a complete dining experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen serving a menu including steak frites, steak bites, French dip sandwiches, clam chowder, carne asada tacos, and flatbreads.
Full bar available; no mention of BYOB policy.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art Golfzon simulator technology with advanced ball tracking and realistic course conditions.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available, but it's a common amenity at simulator venues. It is recommended to contact the venue directly to inquire about club rental options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, suggesting an in-house food and drink service. There is no mention of a BYOB (bring your own bottle) policy for alcohol.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes. The duration can vary significantly based on the number of players in a bay, the simulator software, and how quickly the group plays.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly mention being kid-friendly. While it offers food and can host events like birthday parties, it is recommended to contact the venue directly to confirm their policy on children.
